mapper.sql: id, parent_id, group_code, group_name, group_path, group_level, source_datasource_id, target_datasource_id, owner_user_id, enable_status, notify_enabled, notify_channel, notify_webhook_url, remark, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ea_archive_group ( parent_id, group_code, group_name, group_path, group_level, source_datasource_id, target_datasource_id, owner_user_id, enable_status, notify_enabled, notify_channel, notify_webhook_url, remark, creator_id, updater_id ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{groupPath}, #{groupLevel}, #{sourceDatasourceId}, #{targetDatasourceId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{enableStatus}, #{notifyEnabled}, #{notifyChannel}, #{notifyWebhookUrl}, #{remark}, #{creatorId}, #{updaterId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ea_archive_group
parent_id = #{parentId}, group_code = #{groupCode}, group_name = #{groupName}, group_path = #{groupPath}, group_level = #{groupLevel}, source_datasource_id = #{sourceDatasourceId}, target_datasource_id = #{targetDatasourceId}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, enable_status = #{enableStatus}, notify_enabled = #{notifyEnabled}, notify_channel = #{notifyChannel}, notify_webhook_url = #{notifyWebhookUrl}, remark = #{remark}, updater_id = #{updaterId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group SET enable_status = #{enableStatus}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group SET owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group SET deleted = 1, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ea_archive_group WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM ea_archive_group
ORDER BY group_level ASC, parent_id ASC, id DESC
